title: Garden Joy
description: Modpack based on Farmer's Delight and Let's Do for a comfortable time!
body:
![Garden wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a829b38c10bb15c36a01b3a0cfb6250d082ed4c9.png)
# **Garden Joy**
Immerse yourself in the world of rural idyll with our modpack. This modpack is perfect for those who dream of a calm and peaceful survival, full of elements of farming, cooking and new discoveries!

## _Game mechanics_
🏔️ Enjoy the picturesque hills, fertile plains and fishing spots by the lakes

🏰 There are many new structures waiting for you, such as cozy villages and windmills, which add atmosphere and variety to the gameplay

🥧 Cook delicious dishes using a variety of ingredients. Create your own bakery, tea house or wine cellar!

🗺️ An old-style map mod will help you not lose your farm

🛠️ Additional mods for changing game mechanics will make the perception process more pleasant

🎒 A mod for backpacks so that there are no problems with transferring resources

🪑 A vanilla-style furniture mod helps add coziness to builds
## **📥 How to install?**
- Modrinth: Download the [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) official app
- Other launchers: modrinth modpacks are not supported by all launchers, a list of supported launchers and how to install the modpack can be found [here](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
Find joy in simple things: harvest, cook and enjoy the beauty of the world around you. Create your perfect world of peace and comfort in Garden joy!
